## etude gc

Report artifact storage or prune named run refs

```
etude gc [--max-size N] [--prune] [run-id...] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for gc
      --max-size int   report runs whose total content-artifact bytes exceed N
      --prune          delete named run refs (requires run-id args)
```
